figures.caption: Table 3. Eight cost control strategies employed by our framework.
Table 1. Deployment statistics across 4 concurrent research projects over 30+ days of continuous autonomous operation.
Table 2. Cost comparison per 24-hour cycle (8h training, Claude Sonnet pricing). Our Zero-Cost Monitoring achieves a 10–20× cost reduction over conventional LLM polling approaches.
Table 5. Feature comparison with existing AI research frameworks. Our system is the only one providing autonomous experiment execution with 24/7 operation capability.

Figure 1. Overview of Deep Researcher Agent. The system operates as a continuous THINK→EXECUTE→REFLECT loop. During the EXECUTE phase, training is monitored at zero LLM cost — only OS-level process checks and log file reads are performed. The Two-Tier Memory system maintains a constant size (∼5K chars) regardless of how long the agent runs.
